desc: A young boy wearing a helmet and backpack rides a blue bicycle in a mountain setting.
A young boy with a seatbelt on looks at the viewer from a car, with mountains visible outside the window.
A smiling toddler sits buckled in a car seat, with a mountain landscape in the background.
A baby in blue overalls crawls on a windowsill, gazing out at a starry cityscape.
A baby plays with yellow rubber ducks in a bathtub.
A boy holding a yellow phone sits on a blue couch and holds his mother's hand.
A masked dentist examines a young boy's teeth in a dental chair.
A woman wearing an apron spoon-feeds a child at a kitchen counter.
Four smiling boys with backpacks are hugging.
A young child sits across a table from a doctor-like figure who is writing on a clipboard.
Four young boys stand arm-in-arm in a mountainous landscape.
A young boy wearing earbuds lies on a bed, drawing on a small wooden board with yellow pencils.
A young boy in a blue vest is packing a blue and yellow backpack on a table, with a mountain view outside a window.
A smiling young boy stacks colorful stones on a surface outdoors, with mountains in the background.
Two young boys are playing with a yellow toy block on a blue bench.
A young boy sits on a wooden floor, playing with toys from a patterned box.
A smiling boy rides a small bicycle on a path in front of a house.
A smiling baby girl in a blue polka-dot dress stands in a bathroom with a toilet and a snowy window.
A baby in blue overalls and a white shirt sits on a light blue mat, looking down.
A baby in a blue outfit stands and touches a large, yellow, striped ball on a patterned rug.
A baby in blue overalls stands while holding onto a small wooden stool.
A smiling mother looks down at a baby with blue eyes peeking from a blue hooded blanket adorned with yellow stars.
A baby in blue overalls lies on a blue mat, doing tummy time and chewing on a yellow toy.
A happy baby in blue and grey plays with an orange bear toy and two balls while lying on a patterned rug.
A smiling mother in blue reads a book with her baby in a rocking chair.
A smiling mother in blue sits on a rug playing with two young boys.
A smiling toddler in blue clothing holds onto a small wooden table while learning to walk indoors.
A segmented serving tray holds various foods like fish, peas, and eggs, surrounding a central blue flower.
A blue plate holds an egg yolk, assorted fresh vegetables and fruits, and a mortar and pestle.
Four happy children walk along a wooden path lined with green plants inside a greenhouse.
A mother, daughter with a backpack, and a baby are looking at a paper on a kitchen table.
A smiling baby wearing a blue bib and hoodie sits in a high chair with a bowl of food.
A smiling mother in an apron holds a sleeping baby in a kitchen.
A bottle with yellow liquid is steaming in a pot of water on a gas stove.
A blue bag holding three bottles of yellow liquid sits on a kitchen table.
Two women in blue, one holding a baby, smile together in a room with desks.
A woman sits in a blue rocking chair, holding a bottle of yellow liquid while looking out at snowy mountains.
A hand holds a bottle of blue liquid, revealing the contents of an open blue cabinet.
A woman in a blue vest holds a bottle of yellow liquid, sitting by a window with a snowy mountain view.
Hands fill a clear bottle with water from a kitchen faucet over a sink.
A smiling young woman with a blue headband washes her hands at a sink.
A mother in a blue apron looks at her baby sitting in a blue container, next to several bottles of milk on a kitchen counter.
A mother in a blue dress holds her baby in an armchair.
A smiling father holds a baby on his lap while the mother sits nearby holding a teddy bear.
A cute baby in blue overalls sits on a kitchen counter, holding a yellow baby bottle.
A mother in blue holding a baby in a striped shirt.
A baby is depicted driving a white van with an ambulance light on a street in front of a house.
A steaming mug with a wooden spoon and bowls of sugar sits on a table next to a window.
A smiling woman in a blue apron washes her hands at a kitchen sink.
A happy boy in blue pajamas is sitting up in bed with juice and a croissant on his bedside table.
A baby in a blue and yellow striped hat and blue pajamas sleeps with a pacifier in a clear bassinet.
A mother in a blue apron gently cares for her baby in a striped crib under a starry window at night.
A smiling woman in a blue apron holds a stack of folded blue and white laundry.
A woman in a striped top sits on a bench, tending to a baby in a blue stroller in a forest.
Spa bottles and towels sit on a table by a window looking out to a starry night.
A mother kneels to change her baby's diaper in a nursery.
A smiling mother in a blue top bathes a baby in a bubbly blue bathtub.
A sweet baby in a blue striped hat and blanket sleeps peacefully in a wooden crib.
A mother in blue smiling at her baby who is looking up at her.
A mother in blue gently holds her baby, who is clutching a small yellow toy.
A woman in blue holds a baby on her lap with a mountain view.
A female doctor and a mother are smiling at a baby.
A mother in a blue apron holds a baby on her lap at a table with a calendar, overlooking mountains.
A female doctor smiles at a baby held by its mother.
A smiling female doctor with a stethoscope examines a baby in blue overalls sitting on a table.
A woman in a blue suit holds a baby while sitting in a room with a laptop and a cup.
A smiling pregnant woman in blue overalls and a striped shirt reads a book in an armchair by a window overlooking mountains.
A smiling man with a backpack holds a happy baby on his lap, in a bright room with other people.
A pregnant woman lies in a hospital bed, looking up at a masked man standing beside her.
A male nurse takes notes while a mother holds her baby in a hospital bed.
A man writes at a table, accompanied by a woman holding a baby, with mountains visible through a window.
A boy with a blue backpack walks down a path through a village with mountains in the background.
